sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46728" key="h(dufwni/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡδῠ-φωνία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n46728.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sweetness of sound</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:9:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.3</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.12</biblScope></bibl>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
